case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. RICARDO E. CALDERON et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED DEC-02-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, RICARDO E.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $432.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, RICARDO E.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALDERON, RICARDO E. $14,269.72 PRINCIPAL, $432.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,702.22, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
